description: Incident response procedures. Documented incident response plan with severity levels, escalation paths, communication templates, and post-incident review process.

subcriteria.name: severity_tiers
subcriteria.reference_text: Defined severity levels P1 through P4 or Sev1 through Sev4 with response time SLAs per tier. Clear criteria for classifying incident severity.

subcriteria.name: escalation_matrix
subcriteria.reference_text: Escalation paths with named roles and responsibilities. Incident commander role, escalation timeline, who gets paged for P1 incidents.

subcriteria.name: communication_plan
subcriteria.reference_text: Communication templates and notification procedures. Internal communication chain, customer notification requirements, breach notification timelines.

subcriteria.name: post_incident_review
subcriteria.reference_text: Post-mortem or post-incident review process. Root cause analysis template, lessons learned documentation, remediation tracking.

subcriteria.name: containment_recovery
subcriteria.reference_text: Containment, eradication, and recovery procedures. Steps to isolate affected systems, remove threat, and restore normal operations.

mismatch_signals.reason: Bug tracking or customer support workflow is not an incident response plan.
A Slack channel named #incidents is not a documented incident response process.
